docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,640.00 FILED BY ZHOU, GUORONG AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, KEVIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-26-1999 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
